title: SGA - Standard Galactic Alphabet Font
description: Use The Enchantment Table Language (Font) as your main Font!
body:
# 🌌 Super Galactic Alphabet (SGA) Font Pack

Transform your entire Minecraft experience into a mysterious alien script using the Super Galactic Alphabet (SGA) — a fully reimagined version of the enchanting table language from Minecraft.

> 🔥 First-of-its-kind pack that replaces ALL in-game text with SGA symbols!

## ✨ Features
### 🔤 Full Font Replacement
All text in the game is converted into SGA
Chat, menus, inventory, books, signs — everything!
### 🧠 Based on Standard Galactic Alphabet
Inspired by Standard Galactic Alphabet (SGA)
Expanded into a fully usable reading/writing system
### ⚙️ Perfect Alignment
Carefully designed symbols for pixel-perfect fit
Works flawlessly across all UI elements
### 🔁 Uppercase & Lowercase Supported
Both cases mapped for full compatibility
### 🚀 Lightweight & Compatible
No lag, no performance impact
Works with most resource packs (font conflicts may override)
## 🧠 What is SGA?

Super Galactic Alphabet (SGA) is an Alphabet System that is used in many games like Minecraft Enchanting Table text.


> This pack turns Minecraft into a completely new experience—like playing in an alien world 👽

## 📦 Installation Guide
### 📥 Step 1: Download
Click the Download button on this page
### 📂 Step 2: Open Resource Packs Folder
Open Minecraft
Go to Options → Resource Packs
Click “Open Pack Folder”
### 📁 Step 3: Install
Move the downloaded .zip file into the folder
### ✅ Step 4: Activate
Enable Super Galactic Alphabet (SGA) in the resource pack menu
## ⚠️ Important Notes
- This pack replaces ALL text, so:
- - You must learn SGA to read the game 😄
- Not compatible with other font-changing packs
- Best experienced without other UI/font mods
## 🧪 Pro Tip

### Try:

- Writing secret messages on signs
- Chatting in SGL with friends
- Playing survival while decoding everything 👀

## 💬 Support & Feedback

If you enjoy the pack:

- ⭐ Leave a rating
- 💬 Share feedback
- 🔁 Tell your friends
